changelog: NEW: Hybrid storage system (Cache API + OPFS + IndexedDB) for optimal offline performance
NEW: Real-time install progress tracker with percentage (0-100%)
NEW: Auto-dismiss success screen after 5 seconds
NEW: Intelligent file routing based on size (<1MB → Cache, >1MB → OPFS/IndexedDB)
Improved: 50% faster large file access using OPFS when available
Improved: Transparent PWA icons (no black background)
Fixed: Removed duplicate and unused icon files
Enhanced: Better install experience with file count tracking
releaseNotes: Major enhancement to offline capabilities. Full portfolio now accessible without internet connection.
